results.title: Apple's Tim Cook and many others say the AI boom is spiking costs — so their prices will spike, too
results.description: Your next iPhone is going to be more expensive than the last one you bought. Same thing for your next Xbox. And it could well be true for your next PC, or TV — or just about anything else with electronics inside it. Blame AI. That's the messaging we're getting from the C-suites across the country:...

results.title: USA Are Rocketing Up the World Cup Power Rankings After Beating Australia
results.description: It was another huge day in North America, as four more World Cup games took place, with the United States of America opening the quadruple-header with a win over Australia and then confirming their spot as the No. 1 team in Group D with the final match of the evening. Paraguay gritted out a 1-0...

results.title: Russia strikes an apartment block in Ukraine's city of Kharkiv, killing 1 person
results.description: Russian guided bombs struck an apartment block in Ukraine's second-largest city of Kharkiv on Saturday, killing at least one person and injuring nine, including a 6-year-old, authorities said.

results.title: An NFL Legend's Son Is Becoming One of the Young Stars at the World Cup
results.description: It was an eventful Day 9 at the World Cup, with the United States of America not only confirming their place in the Round of 32 but winning Group D, setting them for a July 1 matchup in the Bay Area.
